title: Amino Acid Handbook
abstract:
As indicated by the title, the book is strictly a reference work and will be primarily useful to individuals working in the general field of chemistry and metabolism of amino acids. The emphasis on technology and factual material, rather than on reiteration of controversial interpretations of available data, has allowed the authors to encompass a surprising amount of information in a book of modest size.
               The first portion of this handbook deals primarily with chemical, microbiologic and, especially, chromatographic methods of analysis of amino acids.
